## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is focused on one issue or one small goal
- [ ] I reviewed the diff before opening the PR
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior, architecture, setup, or workflow changed
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, API keys, `.env` files, recordings, or private media
- [ ] I did not add new dependencies without explaining why
- [ ] I did not make unrelated formatting or refactor changes
